//: Per-deployment release config TEMPLATE (#203). Loaded only when the agent runs in the Production environment (DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT=Production), which the release/Velopack build sets — never during `dotnet run` or the headless e2e (those stay Development). The #{...}# tokens are placeholders the release pipeline substitutes at pack time (see the Velopack packaging issue) so a fork's published agent targets its own backend + Entra without editing the committed dev defaults in appsettings.json. Any key omitted here falls back to appsettings.json.
